---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for the framework (extractor, fusion, recommender, evaluation method, pipeline step).
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

The research / engineering question this feature would answer.  Be
concrete — "support contrastive pre-training" is too vague; "evaluate
SimCLR-pretrained encoders against the seven currently-supported
extractors on the four DVBPR datasets" is actionable.

## Proposal

What you want the framework to do, ideally framed as a small change to
an existing extension point rather than a new bespoke API.

## Out of scope

What you explicitly do not want bundled into this feature.  Helps the
maintainer keep the PR small.

## Alternatives considered

If you tried implementing this as a plugin and the contract did not
fit, paste the friction here — the contract may need to flex.

## Additional context

Links to papers, related projects, prior issues / PRs.
